# /etc/sssd/sssd.conf
[sssd]
domains = corp.example.com
services = nss, pam

[domain/corp.example.com]
ldap_uri = ldaps://ldap.corp.example.com
ldap_search_base = DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com
ldap_default_bind_dn = CN=svc-sssd,OU=ServiceAccounts,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com
ldap_default_authtok = MyLdapPassword123

# /etc/chrony.conf
server ntp1.internal.lan iburst
server ntp2.internal.lan iburst

# database config
db_host = dbserver.corp.example.com
db_port = 5432
db_user = appuser
db_password = "SuperSecretDB99"

# cloud credentials (should be caught)
aws_secret_access_key = wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY
